questions.question: A company operates a factory for 8 hours a day. Each hour, the productivity of the factory is 10 units. If the factory operates for a total of 40 hours in a week, what is the total productivity of the factory in that week? Use the formula for the sum of an arithmetic series to solve this problem. (5 marks)

An optimization model requires a computational time of 8 hours to obtain the optimal solution. If the model is run on a computer with a processing speed of 2 hours per unit, how many units can be processed in 8 hours? (5 marks)
A vehicle travels from city A to city B and back, taking 8 hours for the entire trip. If the distance between the two cities is 240 km, what is the average speed of the vehicle? (5 marks)
